  how: expression involving nested method calls
references:
  # - citationKey: kaczmarczykIdentifyingStudentMisconceptions2010
  #   id: MMR4

  #   relationship: "Students see variable declaration as object allocation"
---

When nesting function calls, like with ```a(b())```, calls are invoked from the outside in: first ```a()``` is invoked, then ```b()``` is invoked.

frontmatter.shortDescription: Nested function calls are invoked outside in
frontmatter.shortCorrection: Nested function calls are invoked inside out
